subject: Fwd: Maxwell (███████████)
body:
Thank you for your response. My initial questions are fairly general I believe.

Was Former Pres Clinton ever a guest on the island?
Was George Mitchell a guest?
Would any of the guests get massages from the girls brought by Mr. Epstein or Ms. Maxwell?
Do you remember █████████████████?
What was her interaction with Ms. Maxwell?
How many massages would Mr. Epstein get per day? I understand that the massages happened in a location where, based on the article I read, Ghislaine instructed you to never go while in use. But I am curious knowing - were the massages done by the various young girls brought to the island? Did they appear to be massage therapists? I think I know that answer based again on the previous article I read.

Were you aware of Ghislaine flying a helicopter? Flying girls to the island? Flying guests to the island?
What did you understand Ghislaine's role to be? How did she describe herself or act while there? If she was the "queen bee" girlfriend, then what was her explanation of the presence of the other younger girls? And what interaction did Ghislaine have with those girls? It is our understanding that one of her primarily "jobs" was to find the girls to bring to Mr. Epstein but we do not yet have a firm understand where she found them or what interaction she personally had with each of them while on the island. I was hoping you could provide some clarity based on things you heard or observations you made.

Again, thank you for any clarification you can provide. I am interested in the facts, including any inaccuracies that have been reported in the past which may have given us a misunderstanding of anything.

Sincerely,

Brad

Sent from my iPhone

Sent from my iPhone

subject: Fwd: Maxwell (███████████)
body:
Greetings
Thank you for your letter and sentiments contained there in.
Cathy and I have read a number of articles that have appeared in the press over the past few years. In the cases where statements are credited to ██████████████ I can honestly say that we cannot agree to the statements made and therefore do not see what further info you need. For example, the notion that we served or witnessed the stated alleged acts or parties are untrue.
If you wish to take this further, please supply a list of questions you think are pertinent and we will then decide if any need answering.
Regards
body_html:
Greetings
Thank you for your letter and sentiments contained there in.
Cathy and I have read a number of articles that have appeared in the press over the past few years. In the cases where statements are credited to ██████████████ I can honestly say that we cannot agree to the statements made and therefore do not see what further info you need. For example, the notion that we served or witnessed the stated alleged acts or parties are untrue.
If you wish to take this further, please supply a list of questions you think are pertinent and we will then decide if any need answering.
Regards

subject: Fwd: Maxwell (███████████)
body:
Dear Miles and Kathy Alexander,

I, along with several other attorneys, represent █████████████████. She needs your help and we are hoping for your assistance. She doesn't need much. In fact, all she needs are some good, honest people who are willing to just tell the truth. That seems like a simple request that any compassionate person would accommodate; however, for some reason many people have instead decided to stay out of it and allow ████████████ to continue to suffer. A small number of good people have stood up for what is right and told the truth. We do not currently know where you stand but we know that you have helpful information and are hopeful that you will cooperate in sharing that information with us.

I have investigated various related aspects of this unfortunate story for 8 years now. ██████████████ is one of numerous clients I have represented in related matters. And ██████████████ only wants one thing - for the truth to be known and for her story to protect others. She was a teenager when she was recruited to travel with Ghislaine Maxwell and Jeffrey Epstein. After 2 years she escaped that life and lived in ████████ hoping to forget what she had been through. After Mr. Epstein was arrested for doing similar things to other girls that he had done to her, ██████ decided to speak out about what really had transpired while traveling with Maxwell and Epstein, including events that occurred on Little St. James.

She remembers you and your wife fondly. We read the interview you gave a few years back. There can be no doubt that we absolutely appreciate the probably unwanted media attention that your previous interview drew. We are not at all looking for a second round of that. We are not the media. We do not need any public interview. We are not concerned with anything other than the facts, from your own observations or what you heard while working on the island. We just want to speak with you.

███████ came back to the United States to help others similarly victimized. Specifically, she started a non-profit charity to help sex abuse victims. She very bravely told her story with the goal of starting a new life helping others. Unfortunately, Ms. Maxwell told the world that ██████████ was lying, which has thus far had the impact of destroying ███████'s charity. We are in litigation with Ms. Maxwell where we have to prove something that should be very simple - that ██████████ is in fact telling the truth in her story of being recruited by Ms. Maxwell to travel and "work" for Mr. Epstein. We know she is being truthful. We also know that there are numerous witnesses who also know she is. But many of the witnesses still work for Mr. Epstein or cannot be located.

██████████ - as well as any others similarly situated - deserves the truth. And that is all we are trying to capture for her. We promise not to let anyone in the media know we are talking to you. We are not looking to drag you into anything. We are not looking for anything at all more than the truth, and Virginia has told us that of all the people who worked for Mr. Epstein you were the most likely to help.

I hope this email finds you well. I apologize for emailing you at an address that appears to be a work address. It is all I had. If there is a time when you would be so kind as to talk with me, I would be most grateful. You can email me. Call me. Set up a time for me to call you. Whatever is most convenient for you. Thank you for anything you are able to do.

Sincerely,

<image>
**Brad Edwards**
**Board Certified Trial Attorney**
425 North Andrews Avenue, Suite 2
Fort Lauderdale, Florida 33301
███████████████████████████
███████████████████████████
<image>
